description: LogicN project Claude Code settings — devtools hooks and standard toolchain

hooks.description: Before tests: rebuild the governed .wasm for any fusable package (one with package.lln.json) whose /src changed since its last build, so fused artifacts stay current (#175 fuse pipeline). Informational; always exits 0. Skip with LOGICN_SKIP_FUSE_REBUILD=1.

Full phase-close cadence at the end of every stage: core tests + devtools tests + security/naming audit sweep + provenance audit + full graph re-index. Always exits 0 (informational). Set LOGICN_SKIP_PHASE_CLOSE=1 to skip during rapid iteration. Benchmarks are intentionally NOT included (multi-minute) — run `npm run run` in logicn-devtools-benchmarks on demand.

Periodic drift heartbeat (informational, exit 0): one-line count of R&D done-files in ../LogicN-R-AND-D/_session-bridge/done/ not yet recorded in docs/Knowledge-Bases/logicn-rd-results-log.md — the absorption backlog the owner's standing process (feedback-rd-absorb-positive-and-negative) clears. Drop --summary for the actionable list.
Periodic drift heartbeat (informational, exit 0): one-line count of stray *.md outside docs/ + duplicate basenames + kb-graph orphans/broken-links. Drop --summary for the grouped report.

devtools-standard-commands.code-index: node scripts/code-index.mjs   (query build/code-index/CODE_INDEX.md instead of grepping)
devtools-standard-commands.kb-index: node scripts/kb-index.mjs <terms>   (KB keyword search over ~495 docs — TOKEN-SAVER; build/kb-index/KB-INDEX.md; --code LLN-... for code lookup)
devtools-standard-commands.status: node scripts/status.mjs   (TOKEN-SAVER one-shot: live version/tests/overall-%/open-tasks/R&D-queue + doc pointers — READS version.json, do NOT re-run the suite just to get counts)
devtools-standard-commands.rd-absorb: node scripts/rd-absorb.mjs [--summary|--all|--json]   (flags R&D done-files in ../LogicN-R-AND-D/_session-bridge/done/ not yet in logicn-rd-results-log.md; --summary runs periodically at Stop)
devtools-standard-commands.stray-docs: node scripts/audit-stray-docs.mjs [--summary|--json]   (stray/stale *.md outside docs/ + duplicate basenames + kb-graph orphans/broken-links; --summary runs periodically at Stop)
devtools-standard-commands.code-registry: node scripts/gen-code-registry.mjs   (-> build/code-registry/REGISTRY.md, the live code catalog)
devtools-standard-commands.lint-conventions: node scripts/lint-conventions.mjs   (umbrella: #215 scanner + registered convention checks; --soft to report; --full adds the heavy SEC-002 mutation gate)
devtools-standard-commands.lint-lln: node scripts/lint-lln.mjs [--summary|--json|--soft] [paths…]   (.lln source-quality gate: flow comments + contract{intent} sans auto-settings + no AI slop/bad-syntax; fixtures whitelisted in governance/lln-lint-allow.json; inline //lln-allow: CODE; registered in lint-conventions → runs at Stop)
devtools-standard-commands.coverage-codes: node scripts/audit-coverage.mjs codes   (#218 bidirectional code-coverage cross-check)
devtools-standard-commands.doc-drift: node scripts/audit-doc-drift.mjs   (DOC-004 #219: doc test/package COUNTS vs version.json authority; registered in lint-conventions)
devtools-standard-commands.provenance: node scripts/audit-provenance.mjs   (BLD-003 #219/#216: generated artifacts carry a provenance sidecar + are fresh vs sources; registered in lint-conventions)
devtools-standard-commands.mutation: node scripts/audit-mutation.mjs   (SEC-002 #219: re-introduce each fail-closed gate's hole, assert its test kills it; git-backed safety; ~40s)

devtools-added-2026-06-03: logicn-devtools-naming       — LLN-NAMING-001..005 naming standard enforcement (abbreviations, missing intent, generic types)
logicn-devtools-context      — Context Receipt generator: 51-97% token reduction for AI code windows
logicn-devtools-intelligence — BM25 hybrid code search: indexes .lln files, queries by semantic tokens + structural filters
logicn-devtools-provenance   — Data lineage tracker: maps source→transform→sink with trust boundary visualization
devtools-added-2026-06-05: logicn-devtools-package-graph — Per-package boundary governance: internal edges, external-dependency surface, orphan detection. Writes .graph/BOUNDARY.md inside each scanned package. `--check` = Hardened Border CI gate (fails on new external deps). Run: package-graph --scope <pkg>

logicn-ext-bridge-cpp        — First real implements InferenceBridge: BitNet ternary CPU/GPU bridges (MIT). Real hardware detection (AVX2/NEON kernel family + NVIDIA GPU via nvidia-smi). Native N-API addon is a documented seam; TPLSimulator is the deterministic fallback.

logicn-tower-citizen         — Unified Hybrid Inference Engine (Brain): TPL ternary VPP (BitNet-faithful I2_S), precision router (BitNet/NVFP4/Groq), InferenceBridge contract, governed Load/Execute/Erase lifecycle.
